name: legenly
description: Legenly — Junk Removal Lead Marketplace Platform

scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "green,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
